Bluetooth lock management functions for initializing, locking, unlocking, and checking lock status.

# Purpose
This header file provides a set of functions for managing a shared recursive mutex specifically for Bluetooth operations. It includes declarations for initializing the mutex with `bt_lock_init`, obtaining the mutex with `bt_lock_get`, and controlling access to the Bluetooth-related state with `bt_lock` and `bt_unlock`. The file also includes functions to assert and check the status of the lock with `bt_lock_assert_held` and `bt_lock_is_held`. This code is intended to be included in other C++ files, such as `BTPSKRNL.c`, to ensure thread-safe operations when accessing Bluetooth resources.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `os/mutex.h`
